3075270.name: GawaiiGo
3075270.description:
《瓜仔快跑》是一款刺激的多人在线捉迷藏游戏，让你在竞技中体验乐趣。游戏分为两个角色阵营：狩猎者和隐藏者。隐藏者必须伪装成场景中的各种物品，巧妙躲避狩猎者的搜索，直到游戏时间结束。而狩猎者则需要以敏锐的观察力和智慧，找出并捉拿隐藏者。随着游戏的深入，你将发现精妙的藏身之地和激烈的追逐，让整个游戏过程充满了紧张与刺激。快来挑战自己的隐身与寻找能力，与好友一同投入这场无与伦比的捉迷藏竞技吧！

“GawaiiGo” is an exhilarating multiplayer online hide-and-seek game that lets you experience fun in competition. The game is divided into two character factions: the Hunters and the Hiders. The Hiders must disguise themselves as various objects in the scene, skillfully avoiding the Hunters' search until the game time ends. The Hunters, on the other hand, need to use their keen observation and wisdom to find and capture the Hiders. As the game progresses, you will discover ingenious hiding spots and intense chases, making the entire gameplay full of tension and excitement. Come and challenge your stealth and searching abilities, and join your friends in this unparalleled hide-and-seek competition!
3075270.supported_languages: 英语, 繁体中文, 简体中文
